title: ExperienceAtom
description: A knowledge atom crystallized from an AI-assisted session (vibe coding, debugging, design decision, etc.). Primarily created by agents via the atlas-write skill, and consumed by agents via the atlas-read skill. Introduced in V1.5 (Gap-1 S1.1).

name.description: Human-readable title, ideally ≤ 60 chars for card rendering.

tags.description: Kebab-case tags. 2-5 preferred for good retrieval signal.

sourceAgent.description: The agent that crystallized this atom. e.g. 'claude-code', 'cursor', 'codex', 'trae', or 'user' for manual creation.

sourceContext.description: 1-2 sentence description of the situation / project / task during which the insight emerged.

insight.description: The core learning. ~100-400 words. Must be self-contained enough that a future agent can act on it without the original conversation.

keySteps.description: 3-6 actionable steps or bullet points summarizing the insight's application.

codeArtifacts.description: Code snippets referenced in the insight. Kept inline (not file paths) for portability.

screenshots.description: Relative paths under data/growth/screenshots/<atomId>/*.png (V1.5 future-friendly field, may be empty).

relatedFrameworks.description: Loose link to framework ids this experience could be taxonomized under (e.g. 'ui-ux-patterns'). Does NOT require a cellId.

relatedAtoms.description: Cross-links to other atom ids (any kind). Used by atlas-read to surface related material.

sessionId.description: Optional opaque identifier for the originating conversation session. Used to group multiple atoms crystallized from the same session.

subKind.description: V2.0 · discriminator for crystallized vs fragment
